name: Cigs and Dreams
genre: Top-Down RPG, picture baldurs gate mixed with Sega Genesis shadowrun and disco elysium.
concept: Noir detective game, multiplayer, true detective vibes and style, similar look and feel to disco elysium. I want dark and mature themes, serial killers, long murders, you're a murder cop - dark like true detective. New crimes can be entered into the game and created as dlc. Multiplayer - 2 players can work together. Good info, evidence gathering to make the game hard and very involved. Snatcher style as well - but 2 player. Or look at shadowrun on the genesis, another great example vibe and look wise.
